home.heroSubtitle: Free eye checkups. Honest prices on glasses. Expert care when you need it — close to home.
home.valueChecksDesc: Get your eyes tested at no cost at our village camps.
home.valuePriceDesc: Quality frames starting at just ₹599 — no hidden costs.
home.valueCareDesc: Serious cases are referred to Sri Sai Eye Hospital, Patna.
home.ctaTitle: Can't find the frame you want?
home.ctaText: Tell us exactly what you're looking for and we'll source it for you within 7 days.

auth.subtitle: Continue with your mobile number or email.
auth.toggleLogin: Already have an account? Log in

checkout.simulated: This is a demo — no real money is charged.

custom.title: Request a Frame
custom.subtitle: Can't find what you want? Describe it and we'll source it for you within 7 days.
custom.name: Your name
custom.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Round gold-rimmed glasses like in the photo, medium size

checkup.title: Book a Free Eye Checkup
checkup.subtitle: Our team visits villages with eye-testing camps. Book your free slot — no cost, no obligation.
checkup.name: Your name
checkup.success: Booked! We'll call you to confirm your free checkup.
checkup.referralNote: Need advanced care? We refer serious cases to Sri Sai Eye Hospital, Patna.

referral.title: Expert Care at Sri Sai Eye Hospital
referral.subtitle: When a condition needs more than glasses, we connect you with trusted specialists in Patna.
referral.intro: Netram handles eye tests and eyewear. For serious conditions — cataract, glaucoma, retinal problems, or surgery — we refer you to our partner hospital with experienced doctors and modern facilities.
referral.step1: Get a free eye checkup at a Netram camp.
referral.step2: If a serious condition is found, our team explains it to you.
referral.step3: We refer you to Sri Sai Eye Hospital with your details.
referral.step4: The hospital team takes over your treatment and follow-up.

account.title: My Account
